claims.statement: createVault throws an IllegalStateException if isSetupComplete() returns true.
createVault hashes the master password by calling passwordService.hashPassword(masterPassword, iterations).
createVault generates keySaltBase64 by calling passwordService.generateSaltBase64().
createVault derives an encryption key by calling passwordService.deriveEncryptionKey(masterPassword, keySaltBase64, iterations).
createVault saves a new UserRecord with id 1L and failedAttempts 0.
claims.source_quote:
userRepository.save(new UserRecord(
                    1L,
                    passwordHash.hashBase64(),
                    passwordHash.saltBase64(),
                    keySaltBase64,
                    passwordHash.iterations(),
                    iterations,
                    Instant.now(),
                    0,
                    null
            ));

claims.statement: createVault logs MASTER_PASSWORD_CREATED with message Initialized encrypted local vault.
createVault wipes masterPassword in a finally block by calling PasswordService.wipe(masterPassword).

entities.name: createVault
entities.description: Method that initializes the vault and stores the master password data.

entities.name: defaultIterations
entities.description: Method that returns the default password iteration count.

entities.name: deriveEncryptionKey
entities.description: Method that derives an AES encryption key from a password and salt.

entities.name: generateSaltBase64
entities.description: Method that generates a random salt and returns it as Base64.

entities.name: isSetupComplete
entities.description: Method that checks whether the primary user exists.

entities.name: log
entities.description: Method call used to write an audit log entry.

entities.name: now
entities.description: Method call used to obtain the current instant.

entities.name: save
entities.description: Method call used to persist a user record.

entities.name: validateMasterPassword
entities.description: Method that validates the master password length.

entities.name: wipe
entities.description: Method that overwrites a character array with null characters.

relations.description: createVault calls isSetupComplete to prevent duplicate setup.
createVault calls defaultIterations to get the iteration count.
createVault calls hashPassword to hash the master password.
createVault calls generateSaltBase64 to create a key salt.
createVault calls deriveEncryptionKey to derive the session key.
createVault calls save to persist the user record.
createVault calls log to record vault initialization.
createVault calls now when creating timestamps.
createVault calls wipe in the finally block.
